rationale: In the citing paper, Chakraborty, Kim, and Sudir (2022) appears only in the literature review as a parenthetical example of recent sentiment-classification work using convolutional LSTM. The citation is not used to build the proposed Ising-prior segmentation model, define key assumptions, motivate hypotheses, or provide a benchmark comparison. It functions as general background context within a list of prior text-analysis methods.
